**The problem**

<!-- What are you trying to do that Bouncer makes hard or impossible today? -->

**The proposed change**

<!-- What would you like to see? Be as concrete as you can — wireframes,
     example rules, or example flows are great. -->

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they're worse. -->

**Notes**

<!-- Anything else that helps frame the trade-off. Bouncer is deliberately
     strict — please flag if your proposal softens the "no bypass" stance,
     since that's a core design constraint. -->
